arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Anthony Gordon reveals 'he was desperate' for Stamford Bridge move
arts.sum: Newcastle United winger Anthony Gordon reveals how close he came to joining Chelsea in 2022, a time when new England manager Thomas Tuchel was in charge at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: England expected XI for Greece clash as Lee Carsley makes bold Harry Kane call
arts.sum: England take on Greece in the Nations League as Lee Carsley enters his final matches in charge of the Three Lions while having to deal with a number of withdrawls from his squad

arts.ttl: Paul Merson defends Arsenal duo after criticism from England captain Harry Kane
arts.sum: Harry Kane has criticised the amount of withdrawals from England duty but Paul Merson has defended the players that have pulled out, including Bukayo Saka and Declan Rice

arts.ttl: Carsley dismisses club versus country issue
arts.sum: England interim manager Lee Carsley believes there are no issues when it comes to club and country.

arts.ttl: Four inexperienced England players 'auditioning' for Tuchel
arts.sum: BBC Sport takes a look at the players interim boss Lee Carsley has fast-tracked into the England squad after nine withdrawals.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane 'emerges as injury doubt' for England game after hitting out at withdrawals
arts.sum: England captain and Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane is reportedly a doubt for Thursday's UEFA Nations League clash with Greece due to injury.

arts.ttl: A 'pinch me' moment - Rogers on England call-up
arts.sum: Aston Villa forward Morgan Rogers describes it as a "pinch me" moment after being called up by England for November’s Nations League games.
